article_title: Burnaby Council — 7.2. Attachment 2 - Letter to MVRD Board, dated March 10, 2026 - Proposed Metro 2050 Amendment Options 2026-03-10.pdf

briefs.title: Proposed: Burnaby Council to weigh in on Metro Vancouver regional growth boundary changes
briefs.summary: Burnaby's Mayor and Council are set to submit formal concerns to Metro Vancouver about four proposed changes to the Metro 2050 regional growth strategy — the long-term plan that guides where housing, jobs, and services are built across the region. The proposed changes would make it easier to expand the Urban Containment Boundary (the line that separates urban development from farmland and green space), which Burnaby warns could raise costs for builders, homebuyers, and transit users across the region.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the Metro Vancouver Board's decision — it could affect development costs and transit service in your area.

key_dates.label: Metro 2050 amendment options comment period closes — Metro Vancouver
